xMin.description: Minimum X coordinate (left edge) of the clipping extent.

yMin.description: Minimum Y coordinate (bottom edge) of the clipping extent.

xMax.description: Maximum X coordinate (right edge) of the clipping extent.

yMax.description: Maximum Y coordinate (top edge) of the clipping extent.

outputFileName.description: Output file name for the clipped raster.

embedOutputLayer.title: Embed output clipped raster in file
